creator: DtxdF@disroot.org
text:
(In reply to Joel Bodenmann from comment #10)

Hi Joel,

No problem, I did something similar with the VHS port and Reproduce already checks if AppJail is installed or not, and if not, it shows the commands to install it [1]. Of course, I will add pkg-message.

[1] https://github.com/DtxdF/reproduce/blob/main/reproduce.sh#L115
